title: Supporting growth through regulatory reform: response from Environment Agency CEO to the Prime Minister
body: "A letter to the Prime Minister, the Chancellor and the Secretary of State for Business and Trade from Philip Duffy, the Chief Executive of the Environment Agency.  It outlines how the Environment Agency will support a new approach to regulators and regulations to support economic growth.  This is a response to a letter from the Prime Minister, the Chancellor and the Secretary of State for Business and Trade, dated 24 December 2024. "
